name: artifi-fund-servicing
description: Fund-servicing back office on an AI-native ledger. Strikes NAV, accrues management and performance fees, processes investor subscriptions and redemptions, maintains the per-investor cap table, and produces investor statements. Designed for the back-office layer behind tokenized funds, private market vehicles, and FoF structures — where the front-end (token, DLT, marketplace) is solved but the accounting and servicing layer is still legacy.
